title: Neighborhood Dark
description: Neighborhood is a specially curated texture pack for creators & players alike. It allows users to fully immerse themselves into an environment unlike regular Minecraft or Hypixel. It adds a large array of hand-made textures.
body:
Introducing the Neighborhood Pack for more customization.
Requires Optifine 1.8.9 (Latest Version)
![neighborhood image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34e7a0b2df1ae0f655f8f963099df4e8b48b7248.png)


See all your favourite Houses as intended!
Step 1:
Download Optifine 1.8.9
Install Optifine’s latest version for 1.8.9 using the universal installer. Launch the game with the mod on.

Get Optifine

Step 2:
Download the Pack
On this page, navigate to “Download” click on the link and drag the zip archive into your Resource Packs folder, select the pack and apply it.

Step 3:
See the EPIC items!    
![Neighborhood items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e87bd26183a41071691801c5f13dcbc903f84363.png)


Dark mode provides a darkened GUI for those who know they
stay up far too late and don't want to damage their eyes. For
the hardcore Housing players amongst us.
